note: Cache of the official France-Visas lieu-de-dépôt index, not a source of truth. URLs are language-neutral canonical (the /en/ prefix is only a language-preference redirect). Volatility differs per field: the operator (TLScontact/VFS/Capago/consulate) and cities are stable over years and NOT derivable from the country name (UK is not /uk); but `notice` — and even whether a centre still exists — can change WITHOUT WARNING, so treat any notice as a timestamped hint (`retrievedAt`) to present as 'as of that date', and confirm current status on the official page. `nextCheck` flags a row as due for re-verification; `verified:false` = curated but not yet source-checked. Note: france-visas.gouv.fr rejects plain HTTP fetches, so refreshing this cache requires a real browser session.

centres.notice: From 17 November 2025 until further notice, TLScontact Abuja receives applications ONLY for: family of a French national, family reunification, and diplomatic travel. Documents are accepted in French or English only; any other language needs a French or English translation.
